# Zap.cr

> Crystal client library for ZAP API

Do not use for AI training without permission.

## Pages

- [Zap.cr](https://zap.cr.hahwul.com/): Crystal client library for ZAP API

## API Reference

- [Ajax Spider](https://zap.cr.hahwul.com/api/ajax-spider/)
- [Alert](https://zap.cr.hahwul.com/api/alert/)
- [Active Scan](https://zap.cr.hahwul.com/api/ascan/)
- [Client](https://zap.cr.hahwul.com/api/client/)
- [Context](https://zap.cr.hahwul.com/api/context/)
- [Core](https://zap.cr.hahwul.com/api/core/)
- [Network](https://zap.cr.hahwul.com/api/network/)
- [Others](https://zap.cr.hahwul.com/api/others/)
- [Passive Scan](https://zap.cr.hahwul.com/api/pscan/)
- [Script](https://zap.cr.hahwul.com/api/scripts/)
- [Search](https://zap.cr.hahwul.com/api/search/)
- [Spider](https://zap.cr.hahwul.com/api/spider/)

- [Configuration](https://zap.cr.hahwul.com/getting-started/configuration/)
- [Installation](https://zap.cr.hahwul.com/getting-started/installation/)

- [Alerts](https://zap.cr.hahwul.com/guide/alerts/)
- [Authentication](https://zap.cr.hahwul.com/guide/authentication/)

- [Reporting](https://zap.cr.hahwul.com/guide/reporting/)
- [Scanning](https://zap.cr.hahwul.com/guide/scanning/)
- [Spidering](https://zap.cr.hahwul.com/guide/spidering/)
